title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews a major week of AI developments including model releases from DeepSeek, Kimi, MiMo, OpenAI, Qwen, and Tencent. The video covers new tools and techniques across vision, multimodal reasoning, game design, and robotics. Links to research projects and model releases are provided throughout.
